title: Heavy RPG
description: A RPG modpack that heavily changes the game thanks to new mechanics and structures to explore !
body:
A Forge RPG Modpack that heavily changes the game thanks to new mechanics and places to discover !

New structures, creatures, mechanics and items brought by [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks), [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm), [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) and [Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs).

Exploration enhanced thanks to [Expanded Ecosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-ecosphere), [Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4) and [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts).
